nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Pomeroy was born in 1520, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Lady Pomeroy. He died in his hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Pomeroy(은)는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났다. 그는 Lady Pomeroy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.
